title: fix(playground): split vendor deps into parallel-loadable chunks
summary: Adds manualChunks config to the playground Vite build to split heavy vendor deps (CodeMirror ~1.7MB, XYFlow ~221KB, PostHog ~80KB) into separate chunks. This lets the browser download them in parallel instead of fetching one monolithic 5.8MB bundle, reducing the main chunk to ~4.7MB. Only touches vite.config.ts and adds a changeset.
maintainerNotes: Approved by two maintainers (abhiaiyer91, wardpeet). CI failures are in Core Package Tests and E2E Tests which are unrelated to this config-only change in the playground package. The PR is MERGEABLE with no conflicts. CodeRabbit noted a minor nitpick about broadening the posthog match pattern but acknowledged it's optional. This is part of a series of 4 optimization PRs by the author; this one is independent and can land on its own.
